conflicts.reason: Choose one Ajantis in BG2. Standalone Sir Ajantis (by jastey) is more feature-rich with full romance and quests. BG1NPCinSoA auto-skips its Ajantis if standalone detected.
conflicts.source: BG1NPCinSoA tp2 REQUIRE_PREDICATE NOT FILE_EXISTS_IN_GAME c#ajan08.cre. Fixed stale comp_b (was 'Dynaheir' — wrong NPC, should be #60 Ajantis), 2026-03

sum: Continues Ajantis's story into BG2/ToB as a joinable NPC with new quests, romance continuation, and extensive dialogue.
